metadata.title: Generate a visual compliance evidence artifact for a European Union law firm operator using the market_lens framework, suitable for regulatory audit and internal governance.

mission.primary_objective: Generate a visual compliance evidence artifact for a European Union law firm operator using the market_lens framework, suitable for regulatory audit and internal governance.
mission.success_definition: The generated visual contains at least three EU regulatory domains mapped to at least five operational controls.; Each control has a corresponding evidence source (e.g., policy ID, audit log reference).; Validation gates are explicitly listed and marked as passed/failed in the output metadata.; The visual is self-contained and can be exported as a PNG or PDF for audit submission.

in_scope.item: The prompt must produce a single visual (diagram, infographic, or dashboard mockup) that maps EU regulatory obligations (e.g., GDPR, AML directives) to operational controls, with explicit validation gates for completeness, accuracy, and traceability.

conflict_resolution.rule: SR8 canonical artifact fields override renderer defaults.
SRXML validation failures force blocked receipt state.

execution_contract.pipeline: raw_intent -> SR8 classification -> canonical artifact -> SRXML draft -> SRXML validation -> receipt

hard_constraints.item: Do not claim final sealed state from RC2 transform output.
Return blocked-state receipt when SR8 readiness is fail or intake is incomplete.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 1
gate.pass_condition: The generated visual contains at least three EU regulatory domains mapped to at least five operational controls.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 2
gate.pass_condition: Each control has a corresponding evidence source (e.g., policy ID, audit log reference).

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 3
gate.pass_condition: Validation gates are explicitly listed and marked as passed/failed in the output metadata.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 4
gate.pass_condition: The visual is self-contained and can be exported as a PNG or PDF for audit submission.

output_contract.completion_definition: Artifact parses as XML and passes SRXML RC2 static validation.

SRXML_Artifact.visual_objective: Generate a visual compliance evidence artifact for a European Union law firm operator using the market_lens framework, suitable for regulatory audit and internal governance.
SRXML_Artifact.subject: The prompt must produce a single visual (diagram, infographic, or dashboard mockup) that maps EU regulatory obligations (e.g., GDPR, AML directives) to operational controls, with explicit validation gates for completeness, accuracy, and traceability.

quality_gates.item: The generated visual contains at least three EU regulatory domains mapped to at least five operational controls.
Each control has a corresponding evidence source (e.g., policy ID, audit log reference).
Validation gates are explicitly listed and marked as passed/failed in the output metadata.
The visual is self-contained and can be exported as a PNG or PDF for audit submission.

validation.minimum_pass_standard: SR8 canonical validation must be recorded and SRXML static validation must pass.

known_failure_modes.item: SR8 artifact classification cannot be represented by SRXML RC2.
SRXML static validation fails after rendering.

failure_handling.fallback_behavior: Return a blocked-state receipt and repair prompt instead of claiming executable success.
failure_handling.blocked_state: No blocked state recorded by SR8 at render time.

receipt.must_record: changed files, commands run, validation result, lineage
